name: Match Flow
description: Controls the ebb and flow of match momentum

entries.templateText: UNDERDOG absorbs a brutal shot from FAVORED and fires back with three unanswered strikes — the crowd comes alive.
FAVORED pulls the referee between themselves and UNDERDOG, using the distraction to land a low blow.
UNDERDOG ducks a clothesline from FAVORED and hits a lightning-fast spinning heel kick, completely shifting the momentum.
FAVORED is trapped in the corner but explodes out with a desperate lariat, catching UNDERDOG flat-footed.
UNDERDOG catches FAVORED off guard with an athletic springboard dropkick, sending both wrestlers to the canvas.
FAVORED unloads a string of heavy chops that echoes through the arena, shutting down a brief comeback by UNDERDOG.
UNDERDOG reverses a suplex attempt from FAVORED, planting them hard and rallying the crowd for a counter-attack.
FAVORED completely shuts down the high-flying style of UNDERDOG with a brutal, mid-air interception.
FAVORED hides a pair of brass knuckles in their trunks, blasting UNDERDOG when the referee's vision is obscured.
FAVORED uses the ring ropes for illegal leverage during a pin attempt on UNDERDOG, desperately trying to steal a win.
FAVORED detaches the turnbuckle pad while the referee is distracted, looking to ram UNDERDOG into the exposed steel.
FAVORED blatantly rakes the eyes of UNDERDOG to escape an disadvantageous position in the center of the ring.
FAVORED chokes UNDERDOG with the camera cable at ringside, letting go at the absolute last second of the referee's five-count.
FAVORED pulls a handful of tights during a rollup on UNDERDOG, forcing a frantic, narrow escape.
FAVORED sprays an unknown substance directly into the eyes of UNDERDOG while the referee is clearing technical gear from the ring.
FAVORED hits a beautiful brainbuster on UNDERDOG, but UNDERDOG kicks out at 2.9, causing the stadium to erupt.
FAVORED secures a deep roll-up on UNDERDOG, but UNDERDOG powers out at the absolute last microsecond.
FAVORED lands a devastating top-rope elbow drop, but UNDERDOG gets a shoulder up just before the three-count.
FAVORED covers UNDERDOG with a lazy, arrogant one-hand press, allowing UNDERDOG to easily kick out and build fire.
FAVORED delivers a textbook powerbomb to UNDERDOG, but the subsequent slow cover allows for a highly dramatic near-fall.
FAVORED scales the ropes to deliver a victory pose before pinning UNDERDOG, giving UNDERDOG enough time to survive the cover.
FAVORED locks in a crossface that looks like the end, but UNDERDOG dramatically scratches and claws to touch the bottom rope.
An accidental collision knocks the referee out cold, leaving FAVORED and UNDERDOG completely on their own without an official.
The referee is slow to get into position, costing FAVORED a clear three-count over a totally incapacitated UNDERDOG.
The referee catches FAVORED trying to use a foreign object on UNDERDOG, throwing the weapon out and issuing a final warning.
FAVORED gets into a heated face-to-face argument with the referee, giving UNDERDOG plenty of time to shake off the damage.
A disputed count by the referee leads to total confusion in the ring, allowing UNDERDOG to sneak in a quick rollup on FAVORED.
The referee misses a blatant low blow from FAVORED on UNDERDOG because they were busy handling a distraction on the apron.
An aggressive manager jumps onto the apron, breaking up a submission hold that UNDERDOG had locked tight on FAVORED.
A rival faction member sprints down the ramp, tripping UNDERDOG from the floor while FAVORED hits the ropes.
An ally of UNDERDOG rushes the ring to neutralize outside interference, keeping the playing field level against FAVORED.
FAVORED profits from a sudden distraction at the entranceway, allowing them to blindside an unfocused UNDERDOG.
The tag team partner of FAVORED sneaks a heavy metal chair into the ring while the referee deals with UNDERDOG.
An uninvited superstar walks out to the stage, completely distracting both FAVORED and UNDERDOG as the match grinds to a halt.
FAVORED whips UNDERDOG violently into the ringside steel steps, sending a sickening thud through the entire arena floor.
UNDERDOG side-steps a charging FAVORED, sending FAVORED crashing shoulder-first directly into the unyielding steel ring post.
FAVORED launches UNDERDOG over the barricade into the timekeeper's area, smashing equipment and scattered chairs.
UNDERDOG reverses a move on the apron, dropping FAVORED spine-first onto the hardest part of the ring frame.
FAVORED clears off the announcer's table, looking to finish UNDERDOG off with a high-impact slam through the plastic surface.
Both FAVORED and UNDERDOG tumble over the top rope together, landing heavily on the protective floor mats outside.
UNDERDOG locks in a textbook sleeper hold on FAVORED, and the crowd chants wildly as the arm of FAVORED drops twice.
UNDERDOG locks a surprise sharpshooter center ring, forcing FAVORED into a desperate crawl toward the safety of the ropes.
FAVORED resists an armbar from UNDERDOG, utilizing brute physical strength to lift and slam them down to break the hold.
UNDERDOG traps the ankle of FAVORED in a high-torque submission, causing FAVORED to agonizingly scream out in pain.
FAVORED attempts to use a submission hold, but UNDERDOG expertly counters it into a quick, close pinfall attempt.
FAVORED lands awkwardly on their ankle after a top-rope maneuver, clutching the joint as the referee checks for a real injury.
UNDERDOG is visibly dazed after a stiff strike from FAVORED, prompting the ringside physician to briefly monitor the situation.
FAVORED targets a heavily bandaged ribs area on UNDERDOG, causing UNDERDOG to double over in absolute agony.
A bad landing out on the concrete floor leaves UNDERDOG completely motionless, building massive tension throughout the arena.
The medical staff rushes the apron after a scary head drop spot between FAVORED and UNDERDOG, slowing the match pace to a crawl.
The live crowd starts a deafening, unified chant for UNDERDOG, visibly fueling them to power out of a lengthy chinlock from FAVORED.
The hostile arena atmosphere completely rattles FAVORED, causing them to botch a standard running maneuver on UNDERDOG.
UNDERDOG stands up and feeds directly off the massive crowd energy, absorbing right-hand strikes from FAVORED without flinching.
FAVORED aggressively goads the crowd, drawing massive boos that mask a sudden, opportunistic counter-strike from UNDERDOG.
A stadium-wide dueling chant creates an incredibly epic big-match atmosphere as FAVORED and UNDERDOG trade heavy blows center ring.
UNDERDOG pulls off a breathtaking desperation dropkick out of the corner, catching a charging FAVORED square in the jaw.
FAVORED is running hot, but UNDERDOG catches them out of nowhere with a desperation DDT, leaving both wrestlers laid out flat.
UNDERDOG hits a wild, high-stakes dive over the top rope, crashing blindly into FAVORED to stop a slow defeat.
FAVORED dominates for minutes until UNDERDOG hits a desperation low blow while the referee's view is entirely blocked.
UNDERDOG uses a sudden jawbreaker to instantly break out of an overwhelming, heavy power hold applied by FAVORED.
UNDERDOG fights through a wave of exhaustion to nail FAVORED with an overhead belly-to-belly suplex into the turnbuckle.
FAVORED attempts a high-risk splash, but UNDERDOG gets their knees up, inflicting immense damage to the midsection of FAVORED.
FAVORED applies a grueling bearhug, systematically wearing down the core strength and breathing capability of UNDERDOG.
UNDERDOG lands a flurry of quick, tactical kicks to the legs of FAVORED, successfully cutting the bigger wrestler down to size.
FAVORED uses an aggressive, illegal hair pull to drag UNDERDOG back down to the canvas during a crucial vertical base scramble.
UNDERDOG executes a textbook sunset flip from the second rope, securing a highly convincing, fast two-count on FAVORED.
FAVORED throws UNDERDOG over the top rope, but UNDERDOG skins the cat to pull themselves back in, shocking an unaware FAVORED.
FAVORED systematically targets the left arm of UNDERDOG, slamming it repeatedly against the hard edge of the ring apron.
UNDERDOG hits a desperation enzuigiri that rocks FAVORED, sending FAVORED stumbling through the ropes out to the floor.
FAVORED lands a massive running big boot that sends the mouthguard of UNDERDOG flying across the ringside area.
UNDERDOG uses a back body drop to send an overaggressive FAVORED flying high over the ropes onto a group of security personnel.
FAVORED locks a sleeper hold on UNDERDOG, using the referee's body position to mask their fingers actively gripping the illegal tights.
UNDERDOG hits a series of rapid-fire clotheslines, bringing the entire stadium audience to their feet as FAVORED stumbles.
FAVORED attempts a simple vertical suplex, but their lower back spasms, causing them to drop UNDERDOG awkwardly.
UNDERDOG slides between the legs of FAVORED, executing a lightning-fast schoolboy pin that almost ends the match right here.
FAVORED bites the forehead of UNDERDOG while trapped in a tight corner lockup, drawing a stern admonishment from the official.
UNDERDOG connects with a spectacular diving crossbody, but FAVORED uses the momentum to roll through and attempt a pin of their own.
FAVORED drives their knee repeatedly into the skull of UNDERDOG while UNDERDOG is helplessly trapped in the ring ropes.
UNDERDOG unloads a fierce desperate headbutt that stuns both competitors, leaving them sagging against the turnbuckles to recover.
FAVORED mocks the signature taunt of UNDERDOG, immediately turning around into a devastating, explosive lariat from a furious UNDERDOG.
